title: Which yoga studio offers most variety of classes?

messages.content: Which yoga studio offers most variety of classes?

Based on the analysis data, **Three Boons Yoga Berlin** offers the most variety of classes across their locations:

## Three Boons Yoga Class Styles

| Location | Class Styles Offered |
|----------|---------------------|
| **Kreuzberg** | Jivamukti, Yin Yoga, The Razor's Edge |
| **Mitte** | Jivamukti, Black Lotus Yoga, Yin Yoga, The Razor's Edge |
| **Charlottenburg** | Jivamukti, Yin Yoga, The Razor's Edge, Three Boons Foundations, Sonic Yin |
| **Live-Stream** | Jivamukti, Black Lotus Yoga, The Razor's Edge, Yin Yoga |

### Unique styles across all locations:
1. Jivamukti
2. Yin Yoga
3. The Razor's Edge
4. Black Lotus Yoga
5. Three Boons Foundations
6. Sonic Yin

## Comparison to Other Studios
- **SHA-LA Studios (Berlin)** — No class styles visible (widget-dependent)
- **Hot Yoga Barcelona** — Only Bikram 90 and Vinyasa 60
- **DoinYoga (Wrocław)** — Power Yoga, Vinyasa Flow, Yin Yoga, Poranna Yoga, Asana Lab

Three Boons stands out with **6 distinct class styles** and also offers **live-streaming**, giving it the broadest range overall.
